title: Automation Conundrum with Numbers for Inventory Management
excerpt: I’m building a board for our receptionist to use for inventory management. We have a reorder threshold number and an on hand number. I’d like the automation to work to where if the on hand number is below the reorder thr…

posts.author: maffrandj (Jim Maffrand)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m building a board for our receptionist to use for inventory management. We have a reorder threshold number and an on hand number. I’d like the automation to work to where if the on hand number is below the reorder threshold number to notify an employee. The automation requires me to input an integer - I can’t specify a column. Does anyone have a workaround or way to do this?

Screenshot 2024-04-19 152204954×367 14.7 KB

posts.author: jennifer.pollock (Jennifer)
posts.cookedHtml: This is exactly what I am trying to do. I see there are no answers here. Did you find a workaround?

posts.author: maffrandj (Jim Maffrand)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately, I did not find a workaround yet. So this project has been put on the backburner for the time being.
